ogTitle: Pascoe Vale South vs Pastoria East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pascoe Vale South and Pastoria East.
heading: Pascoe Vale South vs Pastoria East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pascoe Vale South, Victoria and Pastoria East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pastoria East has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pascoe Vale South (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pascoe Vale South or Pastoria East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pascoe Vale South has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Pastoria East scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pascoe Vale South scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Pastoria East scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pascoe Vale South or Pastoria East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pastoria East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
